game.matchup: San Antonio Spurs @ Oklahoma City Thunder
game.series_context: Spurs won 4 of 5 regular-season/Cup matchups versus OKC; final late-season matchup excluded from primary rolling-window weighting because OKC starters were not meaningfully involved.

moneyline.market_note: OKC favored but not priced as mismatch; SAS plus price has upset optionality but not a primary edge.

spread.model_note: OKC -6.5 is thin plus-money lean; SAS +7.5 would be preferred if available at reasonable vig.

total.model_note: Over 220.5 is the cleanest pregame strike if -110 to -115. Avoid paying -120 unless live-flow pocket allows smaller stake.

sas.model_note: SAS O105.5 has line value but is overpriced at -154. Preferred book target is SAS O106.5 at -115 or better.

okc.model_note: OKC O113.5 is playable at -115 or better. OKC O115.5 +109 is market-correct, not a strike.

deaaron_fox.status: Questionable ankle; participated in shootaround; likely game-time confirmation gate.

luke_kornet.status: Questionable foot; limited postseason role but important as backup size versus OKC bigs.

jalen_williams.status: Expected to return / no longer listed as inactive in provided context.
jalen_williams.model_effect: Restores OKC secondary creation, wing defense, and transition stability.

sga_mvp_trophy.effect: First-quarter energy and usage bump, not a full-game blind over boost.

wembanyama_response.effect: Raises early aggression and shot/block/rebound volatility.

chet_vs_wemby.effect: Interior contest rate, rim deterrence, and foul volatility elevated.

passes.reason: Model probability around 59.5%; price implies roughly 60.6%, making it overpriced despite low line.
Projection sits near 114.9/115; plus money is tempting but probability only around 47.8%, roughly fair.
Model probability aligns too closely with market.
Needs +215 or better for value threshold.

liveflow_triggers.if_total_jumps_to_225_plus: Do not chase over; evaluate Under 229.5+ only if pace is normal and scoring is shotmaking-driven.
liveflow_triggers.if_q1_55_to_58_with_good_pace: Hold full-game over; pace profile remains supportive.
liveflow_triggers.if_sas_slow_start_but_fox_moves_well: Look for discounted SAS live team total over.
liveflow_triggers.if_fox_limited: Downgrade SAS TT, full-game over, and Castle efficiency.
liveflow_triggers.if_wembanyama_two_early_fouls: Avoid SAS overs; pivot toward OKC TT live over or Chet rebound/points live.

final_call.primary: Full Game Over 220.5 if -110 to -115; stake $5 max.
final_call.secondary: SAS TT Over 106.5 if -115 or better; stake $2.50-$3.00.
final_call.note: No parlay recommendation; keep LiveFlow pocket open for one $5 in-game strike.
